attacking_style: Targets penultimate climbs for attacks, demonstrating a preference for setting up moves before the final ascent. Opportunistically infiltrates breakaways on varied terrain to accumulate KOM points.
team_tactics: Operates with significant autonomy, often riding for personal objectives (KOM classification) rather than strict team hierarchy. Limited evidence of dedicated domestique support for attacks.
terrain_preference: Multi-climb stages where penultimate ascents allow selection before finale. Adapts well to non-mountain stages with classified climbs for opportunistic points gathering.
vulnerability: Vulnerable to stronger riders bridging solo attacks and refusing cooperation. Lacks explosive power to sustain attacks when tactical cooperation breaks down on final climbs.
key_patterns: Attacks on penultimate climbs rather than saving effort for final ascent (2 observations)
Actively pursues KOM classification through strategic breakaway infiltration across stage types (2 observations)
Susceptible to tactical isolation when bridging riders refuse to share workload (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: 5-year gap between observations makes trajectory assessment impossible, though 2022 shows continued KOM hunting capability
